function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used cast records as canonical birthday authority, and verified named entity via its canonical file.
function.outcome_justification: Using context date 2026-03-02 and birthday data discovered in 10_entities/cast, the nearest upcoming birthday date was 04-04. The canonical file 10_entities/cast/petra.md confirms the exact name for that date as Petra Novak, with no same-date tie found in the cast birthday search results.
